TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Barr, title = John_Barr, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Barr} }

S.FORM: John Barr sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1918 , ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 8, John Barr, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Barr sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1918 , ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 8, John Barr, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2002) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βarr s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj **** , rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, *oħn βarr, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
